description: playboy is all about living life with a little style and pleasure, if you aren't afraid to be yourself then feel free to express your cheeky side with this stylish watch. Fashionable, feminine and the highest quality construction - you'll be turning heads for all the right reasons! Case diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel round case with playboy branding on the bezel Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Pink dial with metallic hands Comes with removable and changable bezels Playboy branding on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
